text:
Created attachment 195342
Proposed patch (since 474178 revision)

Patch to update editors/focuswriter port from 1.6.14 to 1.6.15 version.

Look following links for changes:
https://github.com/gottcode/focuswriter/compare/v1.6.14...v1.6.15
https://github.com/gottcode/focuswriter/blob/v1.6.15/ChangeLog#L1-L4

The build was tested on FreeBSD 10.4 amd64.
